existing_features.title: Create a patient registration system that captures patient name, contact information, and medical record number
Implement appointment scheduling system allowing staff to book, view, and manage patient appointments with date, time, and appointment type
Build a medical records management system where doctors can add visit notes, diagnoses, and prescriptions for each patient appointment

Design a clean, professional frontend interface with a modern medical theme using calming green and white color palette, clear typography suitable for healthcare professionals, and an intuitive dashboard layout with easy navigation between patients, appointments, and records sections
Render generated clinic-related images including medical icons and healthcare-themed graphics as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
Update the application title in frontend/index.html to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App' in the browser tab
Update the application branding in Layout.tsx header to display 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the main application name
Update the login page branding in LoginPage.tsx to show 'Mannosalva Clinic App' as the application name
Update the footer branding in Layout.tsx to reference 'Mannosalva Clinic App' consistently
